name: Famous Lemonade Pie (Modified for 4th of July)
recipeIngredient: 6 oz graham cracker pie crust, 9 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sweetened condensed milk and thawed lemonade in a bowl (do not mix according to package directions for lemonade).
2. Refrigerate the mixture for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, fold in the Cool Whip® until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crusts.
5. Fold in the fresh strawberries and blueberries, then decorate the top with additional berries.
6. Refrigerate for at least two hours or longer. Keep refrigerated after serving.
